CREATE TABLE test_cast (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT CAST(value AS VARCHAR(10)) FROM test_cast WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST((value + 100) AS VARCHAR(10)) FROM test_cast WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST(COALESCE(value, 0) AS VARCHAR(10)) FROM test_cast WHERE id = 2;
SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR(10)) FROM test_cast WHERE value > 0;
SELECT a.id, CAST(a.value AS VARCHAR(20)) AS value_text, b.name FROM test_cast a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.name::INT;
SELECT CAST((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_cast WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS VARCHAR(10));
SELECT CAST(CAST(value AS FLOAT) + 50 AS VARCHAR(10)) FROM test_cast;
SELECT id, CAST(value AS VARCHAR(10)) AS text_value FROM test_cast WHERE CAST(id AS VARCHAR(10)) = '1';
SELECT CAST(CONCAT(name, ' - ', CAST(id AS VARCHAR(10))) AS VARCHAR(50)) FROM another_table a JOIN test_cast b ON a.name = CAST(b.id AS VARCHAR(20));
